# nomad_acl_policy (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nomad_acl_policy" "dev" {
  name        = "dev"
  description = "Submit jobs to the dev environment."
  rules_hcl   = file("${path.module}/dev.hcl")
}

resource "nomad_acl_policy" "dev" {
  name        = "dev"
  description = "Submit jobs to the dev environment."

  rules_hcl = <<EOT
namespace "dev" {
  policy = "write"
}
EOT
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name for this policy.
- `rules_hcl` (String) HCL or JSON representation of the rules to enforce on this policy. Use file() to specify a file as input.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description for this policy.
- `job_acl` (Block List, Max: 1) Workload identity association that should be applied to the policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--job_acl))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--job_acl"></a>
### Nested Schema for `job_acl`

Optional:

- `group` (String) Group
- `job_id` (String) Job. If empty, the policy applies to all jobs in the namespace.
- `namespace` (String) Namespace
- `task` (String) Task
